Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.common

Class StreamChatBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.common.StreamChatBuilder
public class StreamChatBuilder extends Object
Builder for creating a StreamChat with multiple platform inputs.

The builder collects platform targets, listeners, and connection options, then creates one unified client.

Since:
1.0.0

  • Constructor Details

    • StreamChatBuilder

      public StreamChatBuilder()

  • Method Details

    • add

      public StreamChatBuilder add(String input)
      Adds a channel input and auto-detects the platform from the input value.

      Default behavior: platform auto-detection is enabled. This is optional.

      Parameters:
      input - channel URL or platform identifier
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the platform cannot be detected

    • add

      public StreamChatBuilder add(String input, DonationPlatform platform)
      Adds a channel input for the specified platform.

      Default behavior: no explicit platform is set. This method is optional and used when auto-detection is not desired.

      Parameters:
      input - channel URL or platform identifier
      platform - target platform for the input
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • addChzzk

      public StreamChatBuilder addChzzk(String channelId)
      Adds a Chzzk channel.

      Default value: no Chzzk channel is added. Optional.

      Parameters:
      channelId - Chzzk channel ID or resolvable Chzzk URL
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • addCiMe

      public StreamChatBuilder addCiMe(String channelSlug)
      Adds a CiMe channel.

      Default value: no CiMe channel is added. Optional.

      Parameters:
      channelSlug - CiMe channel slug or resolvable CiMe URL
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • addSoop

      public StreamChatBuilder addSoop(String streamerId)
      Adds a SOOP channel.

      Default value: no SOOP channel is added. Optional.

      Parameters:
      streamerId - SOOP streamer ID or resolvable SOOP URL
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • addToonation

      public StreamChatBuilder addToonation(String alertboxKey)
      Adds a Toonation alert box source.

      Default value: no Toonation source is added. Optional.

      Parameters:
      alertboxKey - Toonation alert box key or resolvable Toonation URL
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • addYouTube

      public StreamChatBuilder addYouTube(String videoId)
      Adds a YouTube live source.

      Default value: no YouTube source is added. Optional.

      Parameters:
      videoId - YouTube video ID or resolvable YouTube URL
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withChzzk

      public StreamChatBuilder withChzzk(Chzzk chzzk)
      Sets the Chzzk API client used for Chzzk connections.

      Default value: if not set, a default Chzzk instance is created during build() when Chzzk channels were added. Optional.

      Parameters:
      chzzk - Chzzk client instance
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withListener

      public StreamChatBuilder withListener(StreamChatEventListener listener)
      Adds a unified event listener.

      Default value: no listener is registered. Optional.

      Parameters:
      listener - listener to receive unified stream events
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withAutoReconnect

      public StreamChatBuilder withAutoReconnect(boolean autoReconnect)
      Sets whether platform clients should automatically reconnect.

      Default value: true. Optional.

      Parameters:
      autoReconnect - whether automatic reconnect is enabled
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withDebugMode

      public StreamChatBuilder withDebugMode()
      Enables debug logging mode for the unified client.

      Default value: disabled (false). Optional.

      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withIgnoreBroadcastEnd

      public StreamChatBuilder withIgnoreBroadcastEnd(boolean ignoreBroadcastEnd)

    • withSoopCredentials

      public StreamChatBuilder withSoopCredentials(String soopId, String soopPassword)
      Sets SOOP login credentials.

      Default value: credentials are not set. Optional and only needed for SOOP features requiring authentication.

      Parameters:
      soopId - SOOP account ID
      soopPassword - SOOP account password
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • withYouTubePollInterval

      public StreamChatBuilder withYouTubePollInterval(long ms)
      Sets the polling interval for YouTube chat updates.

      Default value: 5000 milliseconds. Optional.

      Parameters:
      ms - polling interval in milliseconds
      Returns:
      this builder for chaining

    • build

      public StreamChat build()
      Builds a StreamChat from the configured options.

      At least one channel source should be added before building. If Chzzk channels were added and no Chzzk client was provided, a default client is created automatically.

      Returns:
      a configured stream chat instance
